assumptions: The concept targets businesses in Suriname unless a narrower audience is supplied.
Placement dimensions, safe areas, eligibility, and overlays require current platform preview before publication.
Exact copy and the official Zenta logo will be added during final design production, not image prompting.

campaign.audience: Business owners and marketers already spending on Meta ads without a clear evidence-backed account diagnosis

creative_strategy.audience_insight: Advertisers often receive many conflicting recommendations but still cannot see which account issue deserves attention first.
creative_strategy.message_angle: Replace guesswork with a structured audit and prioritized 30-day action plan.
creative_strategy.hook: Stop guessing what your ads need.
creative_strategy.hypothesis: A visual transformation from noisy signals to one clear diagnostic path will communicate audit value without promising performance.

format.crop_guidance: Keep the central diagnostic lens, headline, price, and brand cue inside the middle 70 percent of the composition.

visual_direction.subject: A precise glass diagnostic lens hovering over abstract paid-media signals
visual_direction.action: The lens organizes scattered campaign shapes into a clear prioritized pathway and checklist
visual_direction.environment: Dark premium strategy workspace with no real client data or copied advertising dashboards
visual_direction.composition: Central hero object with controlled visual noise on the left resolving into three crisp ordered actions on the right; clean upper-left headline area
visual_direction.lighting: Sharp studio rim lighting with lime diagnostic glow, cyan detail, and restrained violet depth
visual_direction.style: Sophisticated editorial 3D still life, tactile glass and metal, high clarity, premium consulting aesthetic, minimal interface abstraction

copy.overlay_headline: Stop guessing what your ads need.
copy.caption: Get an evidence-backed review of one Meta ad account, including measurement, attribution, creative, account structure, and a prioritized 30-day action plan. No Facebook password required.

image_prompt: Create a polished 4:5 base image concept for a Zenta Creative paid ad image. The central subject is A precise glass diagnostic lens hovering over abstract paid-media signals. Show The lens organizes scattered campaign shapes into a clear prioritized pathway and checklist. Set the scene in Dark premium strategy workspace with no real client data or copied advertising dashboards. Composition: Central hero object with controlled visual noise on the left resolving into three crisp ordered actions on the right; clean upper-left headline area. Lighting: Sharp studio rim lighting with lime diagnostic glow, cyan detail, and restrained violet depth. Visual style: Sophisticated editorial 3D still life, tactile glass and metal, high clarity, premium consulting aesthetic, minimal interface abstraction. Use Zenta's near-black foundation with the controlled palette #030507, #F4F7FB, #B9FF66, #5EE7FF, #9B7CFF; keep lime as the decisive action accent rather than flooding the image with one hue. The image must communicate the strategic angle 'Replace guesswork with a structured audit and prioritized 30-day action plan.' without claiming a result. Reserve clean, high-contrast negative space for the headline 'Stop guessing what your ads need.', support line 'Full Meta Ads Audit • $175', and CTA 'Audit your Meta Ads' to be typeset later by a designer. Do not render any words, letters, prices, logo, wordmark, platform mark, interface copy, or functional QR code inside the base image. Keep the focal subject and copy-safe space comfortably away from edges for placement preview. Avoid no cartoon magnifying glass or generic detective imagery, fake evidence, visual clutter, and distorted objects or anatomy.
negative_constraints: no generated logo, wordmark, trademark, or third-party platform branding
no fabricated metrics, rankings, leads, revenue, testimonials, or guarantees
no copied Google, Meta, Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp interface
no tiny unreadable text, random letters, watermark, or signature
no stereotypes, unapproved likenesses, or identifiable private customer data
no cartoon magnifying glass or generic detective imagery

accessibility.alt_text: A glass diagnostic lens turns scattered advertising signals into a clear prioritized action path for a Meta Ads audit.
accessibility.contrast_note: Typeset final copy in white or near-black on a solid high-contrast area and verify readability at mobile size.

required_review: Verify the $175 price and full-audit scope against the live Zenta website.
Confirm the base image contains no generated branding, fake proof, copied platform trade dress, or private data.
Preview final typography, logo placement, crop, and overlays in every intended placement.

production.typography_instruction: Add the exact overlay copy later using Zenta's bold modern geometric sans-serif system; do not ask an image model to typeset it.
production.logo_instruction: Reserve space for the approved Zenta logo and place the original brand asset only during final design production.
